theme: compute a year of plant state in fewest multiplies
title: Greenhouse Ledger: Fewest-Multiplier Plan for a Banded Conversion Cascade
strategies: dense per-day STEP-only plan, ignores banding and rotation (trivial)
banded BAND steps every day, exploits neighbor-only coupling but not the rotation (greedy)
BUILD once + PERIOD binary-exponentiation across long rotation runs between recalibration days, BAND for the fringes (strong)
sub-cubic composed-map construction / caching across independently-phased runs (open ceiling, uncovered)
